subject: URGENT: Cashless claim rejected at Apollo — Employee admitted
body:
Hi Plum team,

Our employee Priya Sharma was admitted to Apollo Hospital last night for appendicitis. The cashless claim has been REJECTED by the TPA citing 'policy exclusion'. This is an emergency situation and the hospital is demanding immediate payment. Please escalate this immediately. The claim ID is CLM-10234.

This is completely unacceptable and needs resolution in the next 2 hours.

subject: Complaint: TPA denying pre-authorisation for surgery
body:
Dear Plum Support,

We are extremely disappointed with the service. Our employee Amit Kumar has been waiting for 3 days for pre-authorisation approval for a knee replacement surgery at Fortis Hospital. The TPA keeps asking for additional documents that were already submitted. This is causing unnecessary delay and mental stress to the employee.

Please intervene immediately.

subject: Following up on health card issuance for new joiners
body: Hi Plum team, following up on the health card issuance for 50 new joiners who joined last month. We submitted the details on the portal but cards haven't been issued yet. Our employees are asking for the physical cards urgently. Claim ID: CLM-17051.

subject: Query: How to add dependent parents to policy
body: Hi, I wanted to know the process to add my elderly parents to the health insurance policy. Can they be added mid-year? What documents are needed? And what is the premium increase?

subject: New policy onboarding — 200 employees
body:
Hello Plum team,

We are excited to begin our health insurance journey with Plum. We have 200 employees to be enrolled. Please share the onboarding checklist, portal access credentials, and the timeline for health card issuance. Our HR head will be the point of contact.

subject: Great experience with Plum — Happy to renew
body: Hi Plum team! Just wanted to say our team has had a wonderful experience with your platform this year. Claims processing was fast, the portal is intuitive, and your support team has been extremely responsive. We are definitely renewing for next year. Keep up the great work!

subject: CRITICAL: Maternity claim denied — Employee in hospital
body: Plum team — This is a CRITICAL escalation. Our employee Radha Krishnan is currently in hospital for delivery and the cashless facility has been denied. The hospital is refusing to proceed without payment guarantee. The claim ID is CLM-28891. Please resolve IMMEDIATELY.

subject: Reimbursement claim pending for 45 days
body: Hi, I submitted a reimbursement claim (CLM-45672) 45 days ago and there has been no update. I have followed up multiple times but keep getting told it is under review. Can someone please check and give me a status update? Amount is ₹85,000.

subject: Complaint regarding IRDAI non-compliance in claim processing
body:
To Whom It May Concern,

We have identified potential IRDAI guideline violations in how our recent batch of claims was processed. Specifically, the turnaround time exceeded the mandated 30-day window for 12 claims. We need a detailed explanation and corrective action plan immediately.

subject: Query: Coverage for dental and vision — New joiner
body:
Hi Plum team,

Could you clarify whether our current group health policy covers dental treatments and vision correction (glasses/contacts)? We have a new joiner asking specifically about orthodontic treatment coverage. Please share the policy details.

subject: Policy renewal discussion — 500 employee fleet
body: Hi Plum team, our current policy expires in 30 days. We want to discuss renewal terms for our 500-employee fleet. We would like to add enhanced maternity cover and increase the sum insured from ₹3L to ₹5L. Can we schedule a call this week?

subject: Feedback: Seamless claims experience
body:
Dear Plum,

I wanted to take a moment to appreciate the claims team for their outstanding support during my recent hospitalisation. The cashless process was smooth, the authorisation came through within 2 hours, and Arun from your team personally followed up. This is exactly the service we expect from a premium insurance provider.

subject: Employee data upload error on portal
body:
Hi Plum tech team,

We are unable to upload the employee data CSV on the Plum portal. The system shows an error: 'Invalid date format in column DOB'. We have tried multiple formats but none work. We need to add 80 new employees urgently. Can the tech team fix this?

subject: Claim CLM-31499 still pending — 2nd reminder
body: Hi, this is my second follow-up on claim CLM-17051 submitted 16 days ago. We haven't received any update. My employee is asking for the reimbursement amount of ₹1,25,000. Please provide an update today.

subject: URGENT: ICU claim pre-auth rejected — Patient critical
body: Plum team — URGENT escalation. Our employee Mohan Rao is in the ICU at Narayana Health after a cardiac event. The hospital's TPA desk has rejected the pre-authorisation citing 'waiting period not met'. However this employee has been with us for 3 years and this should be covered. Please resolve in the next 30 minutes.
